---
title: "Evolutionarily Stable Strategies"
short-title: "ESS"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "ESS conditions, the Hawk-Dove game, and mixed evolutionarily stable strategies."
keywords: ["ESS", "evolutionarily stable strategy", "Hawk-Dove", "Maynard Smith"]
---

# Evolutionarily Stable Strategies {#sec-ess}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
